originalTitle: Warsh’s new task forces give the Fed wiggle room to put off changing rates until December
summary: During his first press conference as Fed chair Wednesday, Kevin Warsh repeated one refrain in his answers to many reporters’ questions: A task force is looking into it.
content: During his first press conference as Fed chair Wednesday, Kevin Warsh repeated one refrain in his answers to many reporters’ questions: A task force is looking into it.
chineseTitle: 沃什的新工作组为美联储提供了将利率调整推迟到12月的回旋余地
chineseSummary: 在周三担任美联储主席的首次新闻发布会上，凯文·沃什在回答许多记者的问题时重复了一句话：一个工作组正在调查此事。
chineseContent: 在周三担任美联储主席的首次新闻发布会上，凯文·沃什在回答许多记者的问题时重复了一句话：一个工作组正在调查此事。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
